---
title: 'Computational Trichromacy Reconstruction: Empowering the Color-Vision Deficient
  to Recognize Colors Using Augmented Reality'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Ethan Chen
- Colin Hascup
- Yukang Yan
- Gaurav Sharma
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- human_perception
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/uist24.pdf
talk_source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cVt3sZtmRQY&list=PLqhXYFYmZ-VfqlTc5EliOGQ591UoeFCZC&index=119&pp=iAQB
journ: UIST
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
website: https://colorvision.cs.rochester.edu/
pub_number: 83
---
